title: Banana & E Mod
description: Welcome to the Banana and E Mod!
body:
What to expect? 
This mod is full of fun new items, blocks, tools, and more!

E

This mod is being reworked and will be a bit before restored to what it was before.
all previus versons have been removed and will start fresh at 2.0 Pre
